_provenance: schema-derived from R1 acceptance criteria (task r1-fleet-dismiss-table). Single-row invariant enforced by CHECK(id=1). Matches migration 009 DDL spec. No producer-computed values.
description: Expected DDL shape for the fleet_alert_state table: single-row, id=1 enforced by CHECK constraint

columns.id: INTEGER PRIMARY KEY CHECK(id=1) — enforces exactly one row
columns.tripped_at_et: TEXT NOT NULL — ISO format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS (ET timezone, no offset suffix)
columns.triggered_reason: TEXT NOT NULL — same string as exit_triggers.triggered_reason that crossed threshold
columns.tripped_count: INTEGER NOT NULL — number of distinct symphonies that fired same reason in window
columns.active_count: INTEGER NOT NULL — total active symphonies at detection time
columns.dismissed_at_et: TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL — set on operator dismiss; nulled when alert re-trips

single_row_invariant: Only id=1 row is ever present. INSERT OR REPLACE keeps it single-row. CHECK(id=1) rejects any other id at DB level.
absent_when_not_tripped: table may be empty (no rows) when no alert has ever fired, OR the single row's dismissed_at_et is non-NULL indicating a dismissed alert
